variantNotes: All blocks map to existing block names and style variants already present in this project. No new block directories needed. The hero block is used as-is for the marquee banner. The Columns (contact) variant handles the three-column contact information layout. The majority of the page is educational article content authored as default content (headings, paragraphs, bold text, inline links).

sectionMetadata.reason: Hero block handles its own background image styling (full-width couple-renovating photo). Edge-to-edge with no section padding visible. No section-metadata needed.

sequences.description: Full-width marquee image showing couple renovating home, with left-aligned white panel containing H2 heading 'Have equity in your home?', paragraph 'Unlock your financing options with a cash-out refinance.', and primary CTA button 'Get a rate quote'.
sequences.reason: Full-width background image with text overlay requires hero block structure. Cannot be achieved with default content authoring. The background image is intrinsic to the component.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed.

sequences.description: Multiple H2 headings with body paragraphs forming a long-form educational article. Topics: 'Understanding Home Equity: Building and Benefits' (intro), 'What is home equity?' (definition), 'How to calculate home equity' (with dollar examples), 'Building your home equity' (four bold-titled methods as paragraphs), 'The value in home equity' (three bold-titled benefits with inline links). Contains footnote superscript references.
sequences.reason: Author types headings, paragraphs, bold text, and inline links in a document. This is straightforward long-form text content. All formatting (bold, links, superscripts) is achievable with normal word processor authoring. No block structure needed.

sectionMetadata.reason: Grey background (#f5f5f5) provides visual separation for this call-to-action section. Visible padding around content. Solid color section container styling, not block-specific design.

sequences.description: Centered H2 heading 'Still have questions? Talk with a mortgage consultant to hear more about what benefits you can get from your home equity.' followed by a centered secondary CTA button 'Get started'.
sequences.reason: Author types a heading and a link (which EDS auto-decorates as a button). Centering and grey background are section-level CSS concerns handled by section-metadata. No block structure needed.

sectionMetadata.reason: White background is the default, no section-metadata needed.

sequences.description: Centered H2 heading 'Talk to a mortgage consultant' with decorative line above.
sequences.reason: Author types an H2 heading. Decorative line is a CSS concern.

sequences.description: Three items displayed side-by-side in equal columns: (1) 'Call us' - phone number, business hours, Spanish note; (2) 'Let us contact you' - description and 'Get a call back' button; (3) 'Find a consultant' - description and 'Search locations' button.
sequences.reason: Three items displayed in a structured side-by-side layout with contact information. This matches the Columns (contact) variant which is specifically designed for contact method cards displayed as columns. Cannot be authored as default content due to the three-column structure requirement.

sequences.description: Disclaimer paragraphs (loan term interest warning, SCRA service member advisory). Numbered footnotes (1, 2) about debt consolidation details. Equal Housing Lender notice. Wells Fargo Home Mortgage division identification. Document code.
sequences.reason: Author types disclaimer text as paragraphs. Small text styling is a CSS concern. No block structure needed - straightforward text content.

hero.description: Block with background image and overlaid text content for page introduction.
hero.structure: Row 1: Column 1 = picture (background image) | Column 2 = heading + paragraph + CTA link
hero.note: Existing hero block in project. Used for full-width marquee with background image and text overlay.

columns (contact).description: Side-by-side contact method cards in equal columns. Style variant 'contact' applies contact-specific styling.
columns (contact).structure: Row 1: Column 1 = heading + contact info | Column 2 = heading + contact info | Column 3 = heading + contact info
columns (contact).note: Existing Columns variant. Block table header: 'Columns (contact)'. Three equal columns with contact method information.

section1.background: Full-width photo of couple renovating - hero-specific background image
section1.layout: Edge-to-edge, no visible section padding, text overlays image
section1.reason: Background is the hero block's own design (full-width photo with text overlay). Hero blocks typically have intrinsic backgrounds.

section3.background: Solid grey (#f5f5f5) with visible padding around content
section3.layout: Content centered with visible horizontal and vertical padding
section3.reason: Section provides container styling for centered CTA default content. Solid color with padding indicates section-level styling.

metadata.title: What is home equity? | Wells Fargo
metadata.description: Learn what home equity is, how to build it, and why it matters. Discover strategies to grow your equity and explore options like cash-out refinancing.
metadata.keywords: home equity, heloc vs home equity loan, what is home equity, how do home equity loans work, how to calculate home equity, cash out refinance vs home equity loan
